home.metaTitle: Cold Mix Asphalt & Pavement Maintenance Solutions | Shining Road Technology
home.metaDescription: Manufacturer of hot-applied crack sealant, cold mix asphalt, pavement preservation products, and cold mix production plants. Technology licensing available worldwide.
home.eyebrow: Shenyang Shining Road Technology Co., Ltd.
home.heroTitle: Asphalt Crack Sealing, Cold Mix & Pavement Preservation
home.heroSubtitle: Complete pavement maintenance solutions from professional-grade sealants and cold mix asphalt to turnkey production plants and technology licensing. Serving contractors and distributors in 30+ countries.
home.solutionsSubtitle: From crack sealing products to complete production plants, everything you need for pavement maintenance.
home.latestSubtitle: Industry insights, product news, and project updates
home.ctaSubtitle: Whether you need product samples, a bulk quote, or a technology licensing consultation, our team is ready to help.
solutionCards: Hot-applied sealants, cold pour fillers, and self-adhesive tapes for every crack type and climate.
Permanent-grade cold mix for year-round pothole repair. No heating, works in wet conditions.
Turnkey cold mix asphalt plants from 5 to 30 TPH with training, QC lab, and warranty.
Full technology transfer: formulas, raw material sourcing, QC systems, and ongoing R&D support.
Cationic and anionic emulsions for tack coat, chip seal, slurry seal, and micro-surfacing.
Sealcoating, rejuvenators, and protective surface treatments to extend pavement life and appearance.
whyCards: Products tested to ASTM, AASHTO, and EN specifications. Certificate of Analysis provided with every shipment.
Engineer-led support, product selection, application guidance, and on-site training available worldwide.
Export to 30+ countries. FCL, LCL, and bulk shipments from major Chinese ports. Documentation support included.

about.metaTitle: About Us | Shining Road Technology — Pavement Maintenance Solutions
about.metaDescription: Shenyang Shining Road Technology, manufacturer of asphalt crack sealing, cold mix asphalt, and pavement preservation products.
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Shenyang Shining Road Technology Co., Ltd.
about.lead: We are a professional manufacturer and technology provider specializing in pavement maintenance products, from crack sealants and cold mix asphalt to complete production plants and technology licensing. Headquartered in Shenyang, China, we serve contractors, distributors, and manufacturers in over 30 countries.
sections: Our business covers product manufacturing, turnkey cold mix production plants, and technology licensing for local manufacturing.
Pavement maintenance is one of the highest-ROI investments in infrastructure. Our mission is to make high-quality maintenance materials accessible in every market.
Every batch undergoes in-house laboratory testing before release, including raw materials, production process checks, finished product certification, retained samples, and third-party verification.
We export to more than 30 countries and support distributors, contractors, plant owners, and licensing partners worldwide.
about.ctaText: Whether you are a distributor, contractor, or manufacturer, we can discuss how to support your business.
